Why it matters: OPC emits 0.83 kg CO₂/kg during calcination. SLA & TLA are agricultural waste — near carbon-neutral. IFA reuses industrial residue from Waste-to-Energy plants.

Indian Standard Code Reference
IS Code Limits & Clauses
All parameters used in this project
IS 456 : 2000Plain & Reinforced Concrete — Code of Practice
ParameterClauseLimit
Cl⁻ ion contentTable 1≤ 0.10%
Max SCM replacement (OPC)Table 5, Cl. 5.2≤ 30%
MgO in blended cementCl. 5.2≤ 6%
Min. cement content (M25)Table 5300 kg/m³
Max w/c ratio (M25)Table 5≤ 0.50
IS 269 : 2015Ordinary Portland Cement — Specification
ParameterClauseLimit
MgO contentCl. 5.2.1≤ 6%
SO₃ (C₃A > 5%)Cl. 5.2.3≤ 3.5%
SO₃ (C₃A ≤ 5%)Cl. 5.2.3≤ 2.5%
Loss on IgnitionCl. 5.2.5≤ 5%
Insoluble ResidueCl. 5.2.6≤ 4%
28-day strength (OPC 53)Cl. 7.2≥ 53 MPa
Initial Setting TimeCl. 7.3≥ 30 min
Final Setting TimeCl. 7.3≤ 600 min
Soundness (Le Chatelier)Cl. 7.4≤ 10 mm
IS 4032 : 1985Chemical Analysis of Hydraulic Cement
ParameterClauseLimit
SiO₂+Al₂O₃+Fe₂O₃ (pozzolan)Cl. 3.1≥ 70%
SO₃ in cement (C₃A > 5%)Cl. 3.3≤ 3.5%
Chloride contentCl. 3.5≤ 0.10%
Loss on IgnitionCl. 3.6≤ 5%
MgOCl. 3.7≤ 6%
Insoluble ResidueCl. 3.8≤ 3%
IS 3812 : 2003Pulverised Fuel Ash — used as reference (IFA = MSW Incineration Ash)
ParameterClauseLimit (PFA ref)
SiO₂+Al₂O₃+Fe₂O₃Cl. 4.1.1≥ 70%
SO₃Cl. 4.1.2≤ 3%
MgOCl. 4.1.3≤ 5%
Total ChlorideCl. 4.1.4≤ 0.05%
Loss on IgnitionCl. 4.1.5≤ 5%
Lime ReactivityCl. 4.2.3≥ 4.5 MPa
IS 4031 : 1988Physical Tests for Hydraulic Cement
TestPartLimit / Method
Fineness (Blaine)Part 2≥ 225 m²/kg
Soundness (Le Chatelier)Part 3≤ 10 mm
Standard ConsistencyPart 4Vicat apparatus
Initial Setting TimePart 5≥ 30 min
Final Setting TimePart 5≤ 600 min
Comp. Strength (3 days)Part 6≥ 27 MPa
Comp. Strength (7 days)Part 6≥ 37 MPa
Comp. Strength (28 days)Part 6≥ 53 MPa
ASTM C618Natural Pozzolan for Concrete — Class F criteria applied to SLA
ParameterSectionLimit (Class F)
SiO₂+Al₂O₃+Fe₂O₃§6.1.1≥ 70%
SO₃§6.1.2≤ 5%
Moisture content§6.1.3≤ 3%
Loss on Ignition§6.1.4≤ 6%
Strength activity index§8.2≥ 75% of control
